app_release_notes: Major workbook polish + new features. 10-shot sessions (was 7). New action buttons throughout: Save Suggested Load to Library, Reset Composite Weights, Print Pocket Range Card (a new 4x6 printable DOPE card from your Ballistics tab). New scope-click dropdown on Load Log makes click-count math automatic for any scope. After Range Day tab rewritten for clarity. Many smaller polish items across every user-facing tab.
